name: ExecuteIntegration
description: Execute an integration between a source licensee and target licensee using a canonical operation. Uses the Integration Hub API. Use ListOperations to discover valid operations.

sourceVendor.description: Licensee code of the caller, e.g. LH001.

targetVendor.description: Licensee code of the provider, e.g. LH002.

parameters.description: Canonical parameters object that must match the operation's canonical request schema.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional stable key to deduplicate repeated calls; omit if you don't need replay protection.
